reasons: Inherited recipe drives real Command Center UI navigation and presses through CDP.
Inherited trace evidence covers default, selected, and disabled passive observation policies.
Inherited screenshots were visually inspected and show the claimed before/after UI surfaces.
better_version_guidance: A native full-run recorder should replace the screenshot-derived MP4 when capture-helper or CDP screencast is reliable in the sandbox.

coverage.reason: Every acceptance criterion is mapped in recipe-coverage.md.

evidence.reason: Inherited recipe screenshots and trace are strong; video is screenshot-derived because both live recorders failed in the original sandbox.

flow.reason: The inherited recipe uses manifest-declared actions and real UI interactions.

contextual_findings.message: This merge-main follow-up reuses inherited passing recipe evidence; no new UI recipe proof was run for the merge-only task.

suggested_recipe_delta: Use a reliable full-run recorder when available so the video captures live motion instead of screenshot frames.

good_patterns: Inherited real CDP UI navigation and presses
Inherited trace assertions for passive observation fields
anti_patterns: Recorder fallback means video should not be treated as full live capture
